Record.title: Daily Record
Record.description: A daily behavioral and snack record for a child.

nameLower.description: The child's full name in lowercase for search.

preference.description: The child's snack preference for the day.

strikes.description: The number of discipline strikes for the day.

notes.description: Additional notes about the child for the day.

Kid.title: Kid Roster Entry
Kid.description: A child in the program, including their schedule and group.

nameLower.description: The child's full name in lowercase for search.

group.description: The group the child belongs to.

schedule.description: The days of the week the child attends.

records.description: A collection containing daily behavioral and snack records.

kids.description: The master roster of kids in the program.
